details:
ANICHESS RISING STARS TOURNAMENT
1. General Information
Platform: All matches will be played on https://www.anichess.com.
Final Stage Date: May 10, 2026.
Start Time: 13:00 UTC (21:00 HKT).
Held Place: Official Anichess Discord — discord.gg/anichess.
Time Control: 5 minutes + 2 seconds increment.
2. Finalists Selection & Confirmation
Target Audience: This tournament is exclusively for new players from the Lichess community who have registered via the official form.
Eligibility: To be eligible for the final stage, players must have completed the registration form: https://forms.gle/9XGbYmgyP6PNHQbA7.
Selection Criteria: The finalists will be determined on May 9, 00:00 UTC (08:00 HKT) based on the following:
Top 8 players by their Anichess rating among registered Lichess newcomers.
Top 2 players by the total number of games played on Anichess.
Invitation Process: Selected finalists will receive an invitation via Lichess private message or Email.
Confirmation Procedure: Finalists must confirm participation in Discord by May 10, 00:00 UTC (08:00 HKT).
Presence: All players must be present in Discord at the start of the tournament.
3. Match Procedure
Match Setup: The player listed higher in the bracket plays White in the first game.
Hosting: The player playing White is responsible for creating the game via Custom Mode (anichess.com/pvp/custom) and sharing the link in their Discord match branch.
Result Reporting: After each game, players must post the link to the completed match in Discord.
Colors Rotation:
1st game — White (Top seed)
2nd game — Black
3rd game (if needed) — White.
Draw Policy: A draw in the 1st or 2nd game of a match is recorded as a draw; no replays.
Tie-break: In the event of a draw in the 3rd game, the players will play another match to determine the winner.
Order of Play: The 3rd Place Match will be played first, followed by the Grand Final.
Disconnects: Players are responsible for their own internet connection. No replays for disconnects.
Waiting Time: If a player does not join the match within 7 minutes after the link is posted in Discord, they may receive a technical loss for that game at the organizers' discretion.
Spell Strategy Rule: IMPORTANT!!! Starting from the 1/4 finals, players cannot use the same spells in consecutive games of a match.
Spell Uniqueness: ALL spells used across a match (up to 3 games) MUST BE UNIQUE.
Penalty for Spell Repetition: If a player repeats a spell in the 2nd or 3rd game, they will receive a TECHNICAL LOSS for that specific game. BE ATTENTIVE!!!
4. Tournament Format (Knockout)
Bracket Seeding: The tournament bracket is formed according to the Anichess rating of the participants as of May 9, 00:00 UTC (08:00 HKT). Seeding follows the "Highest vs Lowest" principle (e.g., 1st seed vs 16th seed, 2nd seed vs 15th seed, etc.).
Bracket of 16, 8: Best of 1 (BO1).
Semi-Finals, Third Place Match: Best of 3 (BO3).
Grand Finals: Best of 5 (BO5).
5. Prize Pool ($600 USD in CHECK tokens)
1st Place: $200 | 2nd Place: $120 | 3rd Place: $80 | 4th Place: $40
5th-8th Places: $20 each | 9th-16th Places: $10 each
Payment Details:
All prizes will be distributed in CHECK tokens.
Prizes will be sent to the wallets linked to the players' Anichess accounts.
The amount of tokens will be calculated based on the USD equivalent at the time of payout.
Payout Timeline: Prizes will be delivered within 2 days after the conclusion of the tournament.
Fair Play: Any disputes will be resolved by the Anichess referee team. All decisions are final.
